# SDLC2 Stage Flow

0-IDEA.md -> 1-BRAINSTORM.md -> 2-USE-CASES.md -> 3-NARRATIVE-VISION.md -> 4-CONCEPT-STORYBOARD.md -> 5-REQUIREMENTS.md -> 6-ARCHITECTURE-RECOMMENDATIONS.md + 6-PARTS LIST.md -> 7-DESIGN-INSTRUCTIONS.md -> 8-TEXT-CONTENT.md -> 9-GRAPHIC-ASSETS.md -> 10-RELEASE-NOTES.md -> 11-TEST-CASES.md -> 11-TEST-REPORT.md -> 11-BUG-REPORT.md -> 12-DEPLOYMENT-RESULTS.md
